archive_data.question_text: Who among the following is NOT a tabla player?

explanation.english: Pannalal Ghosh was a renowned flautist (bansuri player), not a tabla player. Sabir Khan, Zakir Hussain, and Sandeep Das are all famous tabla players.
explanation.tanglish: Pannalal Ghosh oru perumaiyaana bansuri vaadhagar, avar tabla vaadhagar alla. Sabir Khan, Zakir Hussain, Sandeep Das ivargal ellarum periya tabla vaadhagargal.

archive_data.question_text: जतिन गोस्वामी, जिन्हें संगीत नाटक अकादमी फैलोशिप से सम्मानित किया गया था, _________ नृत्य शैली के प्रसिद्ध नर्तक हैं।

explanation.english: Jatin Goswami is a renowned exponent of Sattriya dance, a classical dance form from Assam, and was honored with the Sangeet Natak Akademi Fellowship.
explanation.tanglish: Jatin Goswami Sattriya aattathin perumaiyaasaari, idhu Assam-il irundhu varum oru classical aattam. Ivarku Sangeet Natak Akademi Fellowship sammanam kidaithathu.

archive_data.question_text: The melting point of a solid is defined as:

options.text: the minimum temperature at which the solid melts to become liquid at the atmospheric pressure
the minimum temperature at which the solid melts to become liquid at a high pressure
the minimum temperature at which the solid melts to become liquid at a low pressure
the maximum temperature at which the solid melts to become liquid at atmospheric pressure

explanation.english: The melting point is defined as the temperature at which a solid changes to liquid at standard atmospheric pressure (1 atm). It is the minimum temperature required for this phase change under normal atmospheric conditions.
explanation.tanglish: Thiravanaana padaarthangal atmospher pressure-il thiraviyamaaga maaraum veppanilaiye athan karaiyedhu naeram. Idhu udhinera atmospher nilaiyil indha maatram nadakka vendiya mudhal veppanilai.

archive_data.question_text: Who among the following has played the highest number of ODI matches as the Captain of the Indian cricket team, as of 2021?

explanation.english: As of 2021, Mahendra Singh Dhoni has captained the Indian cricket team in the highest number of ODI matches (200 matches), which is more than any other Indian captain. Sachin Tendulkar captained only 73 ODI matches.
explanation.tanglish: 2021 varaiyil, Mahendra Singh Dhoni Indiya cricket team-ai 200 ODI vilayattugalil captain-aaga nadathiyavar. Idhu matra India captain-kalai vida jaasthi. Sachin Tendulkar 73 ODI vilayattul matrae captain-aaga irundhaar.

archive_data.question_text: Which of the following schedules vests additional discretionary powers to the Governors of Mizoram and Tripura?

explanation.english: The Sixth Schedule of the Constitution provides special provisions for administration of tribal areas in Assam, Meghalaya, Tripura and Mizoram, vesting additional discretionary powers to Governors regarding these areas.
explanation.tanglish: Arasangathin 6-am theetu Assam, Meghalaya, Tripura, Mizoram janangkalukkaaga pratyeka admin muraiyaiyum, indhu patta nadaigalaik kaaval总督kku koodiya adhikaarankalaiyum koorugiradhu.

archive_data.question_text: विभाजन की कठोर वास्तविकताओं पर आधारित उपन्यास 'कितने पाकिस्तान' के उपन्यासकार ________ हैं।

explanation.english: The novel 'Kitne Pakistan' was written by Kamleshwar, which is based on the harsh realities of the Partition of India in 1947.
explanation.tanglish: 'Kitne Pakistan' endra novel 1947 India-Pakistan pirivin kadumaiyana unmaigalai patri Kamleshwar ezhuthiyathu.
